description: User is reading the task instructions as they are progressively revealed on the screen.
frame_description: A dark screen displaying white text instructions for a flight booking task.

description: The task instructions are being typed out or revealed line by line on the screen.
frame_description: Text content is increasing across the sequence of frames.

description: The instruction text is replaced by a screen with an 'Open' button.
frame_description: The screen now shows a central 'Open' button and the text 'Please tell'.

description: User clicks the 'Open' button to proceed to the Flight Centre website.
The browser navigates from the Askable session page to the Flight Centre homepage.
frame_description: The URL in the address bar changes to flightcentre.com.au and the page begins to load.
